case_title: IBRAHIM, MUSA M. vs. VO, NGAY VAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, MUSA M. SERVED MAR-05-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VO, NGAY VAN NGUYEN, MICHELLE
